title: Launch-on-Init Service Flow
activity_flow: START: launch_services(options) called at GUI startup
ACTION: Instantiate all builtin services (IPCService, ExecService, ... LaunchOnInitService, etc.) via register(name, instance)
ACTION: register('__launch-on-init', new LaunchOnInitService()) — pushes to services_l_ array and services_m_ map
LOOP: For each [name, instance] in services_l_: await instance.construct({ gui_params: options })
ACTION: Service.construct(o) — copies o into this.$puter, then calls this._construct() if defined
ACTION: LaunchOnInitService._construct() — initializes this.commands map with built-in handlers: { 'window-call': ({ fn_name, args }) => window[fn_name](...args) }
LOOP: For each [name, instance] in services_l_: await instance.init({ services: globalThis.services })
ACTION: Service.init(a) — sets this.services = a[0].services, then calls this._init(...a)
NO → return (early exit, no commands executed)
YES → LOOP: For each command in launch_options.on_initialized:
ACTION: run_(command) — spread command into args, delete args.$, look up handler by command.$, call this.commands[command.$](args)
key_methods: launch_services(options): async, top-level orchestrator in initgui.js
register(name, instance): local closure — pushes to services_l_ and services_m_
Service.construct(o): copies o to this.$puter, calls this._construct()
LaunchOnInitService._init(): reads gui_params.launch_options, iterates on_initialized, calls run_() per command
LaunchOnInitService.run_(command): dispatches command to handler via this.commands[command.$](args)
key_relationships: LaunchOnInitService._init() calls LaunchOnInitService.run_() for each command
launch_services() instantiates and orchestrates all services sequentially (construct phase, then init phase)
conditions_and_branches: Guard: if (!launch_options) return — skip all execution if no launch options
Guard: if (launch_options.on_initialized) — only iterate if on_initialized array is present
Dispatch: command.$ key routes to handler in this.commands map (extensible pattern)
Built-in handler: 'window-call' — calls arbitrary global window function with provided args
data_flow: command.$ → this.commands map key lookup → handler function
important_notes: LaunchOnInitService is registered as '__launch-on-init'. The two-phase lifecycle (construct then init for ALL services before any proceeds) ensures global services are available before _init runs. The command dispatcher pattern (this.commands map keyed by command.$) is extensible. Currently only 'window-call' is registered. launch_options comes from backend-supplied gui_params.
